creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
Aiming to close the loop from <https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-src/pull/785#issuecomment-1616720197>: 

- content of the EXAMPLES section is not consistent with direction 
  given (duplicated) in two preceding sections; and formatting of 
  examples within each of those two is inconsistent both within the 
  section, and when compared with the EXAMPLES section

- some examples are misplaced.

> (Now, I realise why I nearly always needed to look at the page two or three 
> times (or look away) to make sense of, and find, the required knowledge.)

If someone else can take this, I'll be grateful. Please don't assign to my freebsd.org ID.
